subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath come with the truth, with such evidence as hath rendered powerless all who dwell in the heavens and the earth, and hath summoned all unto His path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی اتی بالحق بحجه عجز عنها من فی السموات و الارض و دعا الکل الی صراطه
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world
